origami.title: 📄 How to Make an Origami Dog
origami.html:
Origami is the art of folding paper. You don't need scissors or glue — just one square piece of paper!

Let's make an origami dog. Follow these steps:

Step 1: Start with a square piece of paper. Fold it in half to make a triangle. Make sure the edges are straight.

Step 2: Find the top corner of the triangle. This will be the dog's head.

Step 3: Fold the left corner down. This is one ear! Now fold the right corner down. That is the other ear!

Step 4: Fold the bottom corner up a little bit. This is the dog's nose!

Step 5: Turn the paper over. Draw two eyes and a mouth. Your origami dog is ready!

Remember: be careful with the paper. Don't crumple it! Fold slowly and press the edges flat. If you make a mistake, unfold and try again.

materials.title: 🖌️ Art Tools and Materials
materials.html:
Art is fun! But do you know what tools you need? Let's learn about art materials.

Markers are like thick pens. They have bright colours — red, blue, green, yellow and more. You use markers to draw and colour.

Watercolours are special paints. You need water and a brush. Mix the paint with water and paint beautiful pictures! Watercolours are soft and light.

Chalk is white or coloured. You can draw on a blackboard or on the pavement outside. Chalk is fun because you can erase it easily!

Do you need scissors? You use scissors to cut paper. Be careful — scissors are sharp! Do you need glue? You use glue to stick paper together.

'Do I need markers for this activity?' asks Sam. 'No, you don't need markers. You need watercolours,' says the teacher.

'Do I need scissors?' asks Emma. 'No, you don't need scissors today. You need paper, chalk and your hands!'

Every artist uses different tools. What do you like to use? Markers, watercolours, chalk or something else?
